title: TEGNA Campaign Structure
description: Field documentation for TEGNA AudienceOne advertising campaign objects.

fields.name: campaignId
fields.description: Unique campaign identifier assigned by TEGNA.

fields.name: endDate
fields.description: ISO 8601 campaign end date. Open-ended if null.

fields.name: targetMarkets
fields.description: TEGNA DMA market codes (e.g., DMA-539 for Tampa).

fields.name: adFormats
fields.description: Ad format types: display, native, pre-roll, mid-roll, connected-tv.
